description: Meta Platforms Inc operates Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger. It is investing heavily in the metaverse via Reality Labs and in AI infrastructure.
known_facts: Meta's Family of Apps includes Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger
Mark Zuckerberg is Meta's founder and CEO
Reality Labs division develops Quest VR headsets and metaverse products
Meta's advertising revenue accounts for over 95% of total revenue
Meta has over 3 billion daily active users across its family of apps
Llama is Meta's open-source large language model family
Meta invested over $35 billion in capex in 2024 for AI infrastructure
Instagram Reels competes directly with TikTok for short-form video
known_risks: Reality Labs division has accumulated over $50 billion in operating losses
Heavy advertising revenue concentration creating cyclical revenue risk
Regulatory pressure in EU over data privacy (GDPR fines) and US teen safety
TikTok competition for user attention particularly among younger demographics
Apple iOS privacy changes reducing ad targeting effectiveness
Antitrust scrutiny from FTC seeking to break up the company
known_strengths: Dominant social media platforms with unmatched global reach
AI-powered advertising platform with precision targeting
WhatsApp monetization opportunity in business messaging
Open-source Llama strategy attracting AI developer ecosystem
Strong free cash flow despite Reality Labs investments
Threads platform growing as alternative to Twitter/X
